summary: Tested Unified Earnings & Impact Dashboard and Start Shooting button visibility with persona masking. All core features verified working.

earnings_dashboard_pro_view.title: PASS - Shows 'Earnings Dashboard' with subtitle 'Track your revenue and manage payouts'
earnings_dashboard_pro_view.gross_net_cards: PASS - Gross Earnings, Net Earnings (with 15% platform fee note), Cash Available cards visible
earnings_dashboard_pro_view.split_pocket_settings: PASS - Split-Pocket Settings card with Configure button visible
earnings_dashboard_pro_view.split_pocket_modal: PASS - Modal opens with Auto-allocate toggle and allocation percentage slider
earnings_dashboard_pro_view.revenue_by_stream: PASS - Shows 4 revenue streams: Live Sessions, Request Pro, Bookings, Gallery

earnings_dashboard_hobbyist_view.title: PASS - Shows 'Impact Dashboard' with subtitle 'Your contributions and gear fund progress'
earnings_dashboard_hobbyist_view.gear_fund_progress: PASS - Progress ring with 'complete' percentage displayed
earnings_dashboard_hobbyist_view.set_goal_button: PASS - 'Set Goal' button visible and opens Gear Goal Modal
earnings_dashboard_hobbyist_view.gear_goal_modal: PASS - Modal with preset goals (New Camera Lens, Wetsuit, Surf Trip Fund, Board Bag, Custom Goal), Goal Name input, Target Amount input
earnings_dashboard_hobbyist_view.platform_credits: PASS - Platform Credits card with spending buttons (Gear Shop, Travel, Sessions, Sponsor Grom)

start_shooting_button_visibility.photographer: PASS - Start Shooting button VISIBLE (tested as Regular Photographer)
start_shooting_button_visibility.approved_pro: PASS - Start Shooting button VISIBLE (tested as Verified Pro Photographer)
start_shooting_button_visibility.pro_surfer: PASS - Start Shooting button HIDDEN (tested as Verified Pro Surfer)
start_shooting_button_visibility.note: Grom, Grom Parent, Competitive Surfer not explicitly tested but code review confirms they use same non-photographer path

photo_tools_menu.hobbyist: PASS - Photo Tools menu VISIBLE in sidebar with Earnings Dashboard option
photo_tools_menu.photographer: PASS - Photo Tools menu VISIBLE in sidebar
photo_tools_menu.surfer: PASS - Photo Tools menu HIDDEN in sidebar
photo_tools_menu.pro_surfer: PASS - Photo Tools menu HIDDEN in sidebar

god_mode_persona_switching.status: WORKING - Persona dropdown allows switching between all roles
god_mode_persona_switching.cyan_bar: WORKING - 'VIEWING AS: [ROLE]' bar appears at top when persona is active
god_mode_persona_switching.sidebar_indicator: WORKING - Shows '(God Mode Active)' below role in sidebar

test_credentials: kelly@surf.com / test-shaka (admin user with God Mode access)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Earnings Dashboard has two views based on effective role: Pro view (Photographer/Approved Pro) shows Gross/Net/Cash cards + Split-Pocket; Hobbyist view shows Gear Fund progress + Platform Credits. Start Shooting button visibility correctly uses effectiveRole from PersonaContext - visible for Hobbyist/Photographer/Approved Pro, hidden for all other roles.
test_methodology: Used God Mode persona switching to test as different roles (Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro, Surfer, Pro Surfer). Verified UI components, modal interactions, and conditional rendering based on persona.
